title: RepairIT
description: RepairIT is a lightweight Spigot plugin that allow players repair itens without the anvil GUI
body:
# RepairIT

**RepairIT** is a lightweight **Paper** plugin that turns anvils into an interactive repair station. Place a **tool/armor** and the matching **material** on top of an anvil as item displays, then **hit the anvil with the custom Hammer** to repair the item. Clean visuals, sounds, configurable balance—no GUIs, just vanilla-feeling gameplay.

## Features
- **Anvil workflow:** tool + material become Item Displays on the anvil; strike with the Hammer to repair.
- **Deep Configuration:** Take full control via `config.yml`:
    - **Balance:** Set durability restored per material (e.g., `IRON_INGOT`, `DIAMOND`).
    - **Customize the Hammer:** Change its item type (`MACE`, `GOLDEN_AXE`, etc.), display name (colors supported), and `CustomModelData`.
   _(Don't worry, the hammer causes no damage at all)_
    - **Custom Crafting:** Enable/disable and define the **Hammer's crafting recipe**, including the 3x3 shape and all ingredients (e.g., 'A' = 'NETHERITE_BLOCK').
- **Polished feedback:** anvil “clang” on each hit, **electric_spark** particles on completion.
- **Spam control:** 1s hit cooldown.
- **Smart cleanup:** consumes the material, resets the hit counter; breaking the anvil drops any displays on it.
- **Simple admin tools:** `/repairit reload` (permission `repairit.admin`).
- **Update checker:** notify admins when a new version is available..

## Quick Start
1. Drop the jar into `/plugins` and start the server.
2. Edit `config.yml` to balance repairs (`repair-per-material`) and set up your custom **Hammer** (item, name, `CustomModelData`, and crafting recipe).
3. Craft the **Hammer** (if enabled) and use an anvil: place tool + material; left-click the anvil with the Hammer to repair.

If you’d like to request a new feature or report a bug, reach me on Discord: **o_stein**.
